statements.statement: SELECT hex(PollK) AS PollK FROM TPoll LIMIT 1
SELECT hex(PollK) id, FName name, FHeader header FROM TPoll WHERE FName LIKE ''%{=name}%'' OR ''%{=header}%'' ORDER BY FName
SELECT hex(PollK) id, FName name, FHeader header FROM TPoll ORDER BY FName
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uCount FROM TPoll WHERE PollK = {PollK}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uCount FROM TPollQuestion WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
SELECT hex(PollK) AS PollK, TypeC, StateC, FName, FHeader, FDescription FROM TPoll WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
SELECT hex(PollQuestionK) AS PollQuestionK, FName, FLabel, FDescription FROM TPollQuestion WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
SELECT hex(PollAnswerK) AS PollAnswerK, hex(PollQuestionK) AS PollQuestionK, FName, FLabel, FDescription FROM TPollAnswer WHERE PollK = X{PollK}

SELECT hex(TPoll.PollK) AS PollK, hex(TPollQuestion.PollQuestionK) AS PollQuestionK, hex(TPollAnswer.PollAnswerK) AS PollAnswerK, TPollQuestion.FName AS Q_FName, TPollQuestion.FLabel AS Q_FLabel, TPollQuestion.FDescription AS Q_FDescription, TPollQuestion.FOrder AS Q_FOrder, TPollAnswer.FName AS A_FName, TPollAnswer.FAnswer AS A_FAnswer, TPollAnswer.FOrder AS A_FOrder, TPollAnswer.FDescription AS A_Description FROM TPoll LEFT JOIN TPollQuestion ON TPoll.PollK = TPollQuestion.PollK LEFT JOIN TPollAnswer ON TPollQuestion.PollQuestionK = TPollAnswer.PollQuestionK WHERE TPoll.PollK = X{PollK} ORDER BY 1,TPollQuestion.FOrder, 2,TPollAnswer.FOrder
{ "table": "TPoll;FName,Name;FHeader,Header;FDescription,Description" } SELECT hex(PollK) AS PollK, FName, FHeader, FDescription FROM TPoll WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
SELECT hex(PollQuestionK) AS PollQuestionK, FName, FQuestion, FQuestionMore FROM TPollQuestion WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
SELECT hex(PollAnswerK) AS PollAnswerK, hex(PollQuestionK) AS PollQuestionK, FName, FAnswer FROM TPollAnswer WHERE PollK = X{PollK}
